meaning: n.泡,泡沫,废物vt.使生泡沫vi.发泡
examples: The mixture will froth a bit, no worries.
May I introduce you to strip steak accompanied by an airy beetroot froth?
That froth will be skimmed away by tighter money and a slowing world economy.
So don't lament missing the rally -- look past the froth and do your homework.
